name: Stickman Battle
author: Poki
description: Stickman Battle is an action-packed fighting game where you can play solo or challenge a friend in local 2-player mode! Move, jump, and strike to outsmart your enemies, using special skills and powerful supers to claim victory. Whether you’re battling alone or dueling your buddy, every fight is fast, fun, and full of chaos. Grab your weapon and get ready to brawl in Stickman Battle! How to play Stickman Battle? Player 1 Move: WASD Jump: Hold W Skill: E Super: the space bar Player 2 Move: arrow keys Jump: Hold the up arrow key Skill: Shift Super: Enter Who created Stickman Battle? Stickman Battle is created by EasyCats. Play their other games on Poki: Archer Castle , Stick Rush , Battle Wheels , Merge Arena , Merge Penguins and War Master ! How can I play Stickman Battle for free? You can play Stickman Battle for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Battle on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Battle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stickman Battle with my friend? Yes! Stickman Battle is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
